creator: pgiffuni@fps.biblos.unal.edu.co
text:
f2c has been severely updated in the recent months to fix several bugs and provide additional support for g77. 
Latest version is always available at:
http://netlib.bell-labs.com/netlib/f2c/index.html

Fix: 

Very easy to compile. Just one minor patch described in the README for the libf2c directory.
How-To-Repeat: Certain math ports can't be updated until this is fixed.
